title: Procos 93446 Star Wars Mandalorian Party Plates Size 23 cm Pack of 8 Disposable Paper Plates Children's Birthday Party Tableware FSC
features: Transform your party into a galaxy far, far away with our Star Wars Mandalorian Party Paper Plates! These disposable plates are the perfect addition to your celebration, featuring stunning designs inspired by the hit series. Whether you're serving up snacks, desserts, or a full meal, these plates are durable enough to handle all of your party needs.

Introducing our fully recyclable Disposable Party Plates! These plates are the perfect choice for your next event, whether it's a birthday party or family BBQ. Our disposable plates are not only convenient and hassle-free, but they're also eco-friendly!

Made from high-quality materials, our disposable plates are durable and strong enough to hold your guests' favorite foods without bending or breaking. Plus, their sleek and modern design adds a touch of elegance to any occasion
Featuring everyone's favourite character - Baby Yoda!
Dimensions: each plate is 23cm. This product is for 1 pack of plates - with 8 plates inside each pack
description: Product Description Procos Paper Plate - Star Wars: Mandalorian Safety Warning Children can choke or suffocate on uninflated or broken balloons. Keep uninflated balloons away from children. Discard broken balloons at once. Not suitable for children under 3 years. For use under adult supervision. To be used under the direct supervision of an adult.

specifications_table.Material Care Instructions: ‎Disposable - Not for Machine Washing or Microwaving
